message.content:
@startuml
skinparam actorStyle fillcolor: #f0f0f0, border: 1px solid #999
skinparam labelStyle fillcolor: #f0f0f0, border: 1px solid #999

title start EventLoop

server.activeListener.OnAccept [server.activeListener.OnAccept]
server.newActiveRawConn [server.newActiveRawConn]
server.ContinueFilterChain [server.ContinueFilterChain]
server.activeListener.newConnection [server.activeListener.newConnection]
server.activeListener.OnNewConnection [server.activeListener.OnNewConnection]
server.newActiveConnection [server.newActiveConnection]
network.connection.Start [network.connection.Start]
network.startRWLoop [network.startRWLoop]
network.attachEventLoop [network.attachEventLoop]

server.activeListener.OnAccept ..> server.newActiveRawConn : 创建 filter chain
server.newActiveRawConn ..> server.ContinueFilterChain : 创建 connection
server.ContinueFilterChain ..> server.activeListener.newConnection : 调用 activeListener 的处理新连接事件接口
server.activeListener.newConnection ..> server.activeListener.OnNewConnection : 处理新连接事件
server.activeListener.OnNewConnection ..> server.newActiveConnection : 连接启动
server.newActiveConnection ..> network.connection.Start : 处理读写时间
network.connection.Start ..> network.startRWLoop : 保存 EventLoop
network.startRWLoop ..> network.attachEventLoop : 处理新连接事件

@enduml
